calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing; Declaration Of Andrea Lovrincevic In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for request for default judgment against Defendant Rebecca Ayotte.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:20:13 a.m., pausing at 10:13:15 a.m., resuming at 10:14:30 a.m. and concluding at 10:22:29 a.m. (D505)

Andrea Lovrincevic, Esq. representing Plaintiff Lvovich & Szucsko via Zoom Video conference.
Defendant Rebecca Ayotte not appearing.
Terry Szucsko, Esq. sworn to testify on behalf of the plaintiff.

Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract filed Jan-26-2023.
Proof of service by overnight delivery as to Defendant filed on Apr-25-2023.
Order to serve by Publication filed Jul-21-2023.
Proof of service by publication filed on Oct-12-2023.
Dismissal as to Defendants Does 1-10 on Mar-18-2024.
Default entered on Mar-7-2023 as to Defendant Rebecca Ayotte.

Counsel to summarize the causes of action and to provide proof as to witness testimony.
Court examines the witness.
Witness confirms that statement made and declarations submitted are true and correct.
Counsel request to update the pre-judgment interest to include the dates leading up to the hearing date.
Court grants the request to update the pre-judgment interest to include the dates leading up to the hearing date.
Counsel to present to the Court updated total judgment.
Counsel request for a due date for the Defendant to comply with the Court's order. Court orders that the judgment once signed and filed is executed this day.

After reviewing the declarations, considering the statements, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has met their prima facie case and RULES in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendants as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover the following from the Defendants:
Damages $0
Pre-Judgment Interest $28,429.31
Attorney's Fees $60,806.76
Costs $4,952.69
Total Judgment $94,188.76

Proposed Judgment as modified is signed and executed by the Court.
